title: The Crew Learns the Target
description: On pages 9–13, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the crew learns the target.
scene: The scene focuses on the crew learns the target, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So this won't be quite that simple...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're those guys from before, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're taking us lightly, the bastards...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Franky!! Watch out above you !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Nice going!! Not bad at all, frankly!!

summary: The Crew Learns the Target. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
